beats.text: Messi scores stunning free kick -- here's what you need to know.
Right now, Messi scores stunning free kick is one of the biggest storylines in football.
Fans everywhere are reacting, and the numbers back it up.
Follow for more updates as this story develops.

warnings: Stage 1 used the local template fallback (no LLM API key configured).
known_limitations: Visuals are FFmpeg template motion graphics, not AI-generated video (by design for this MVP).
Voice is ffmpeg's offline flite TTS, a temporary substitute for Kokoro/Chatterbox-Turbo pending network access to download those models.
Script generation used the local template fallback unless script_source shows an LLM provider.
